title: Hydrangea Pink Diamond Bushy White Flowering Outdoor Garden Deciduous Shrub (20-30cm (Incl. Pot))
features: Characteristics: Bushy, vigorous deciduous shrub with ovate, mid-green leaves and conical masses of cream-white flowers in Summer.
Growth & Spread: Ultimate height and spread of 1.5 – 2.5m.
Period of Interest: Summer and Autumn interest. Masses of small, cream-white flowers in conical flower spikes from mid-Summer, gaining hues of pink in Autumn.
Water & Maintenance: Plant in moist, well-drained soil. Keep in full or partial sun. Hardy and tolerant of moist soils and positions.
